ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., 'In Progress', 'Completed', 'On Hold') */,
  "budget_allocated" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the project */,
  "budget_spent" REAL /* Budget spent so far */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the task */,
  "priority_level_1" REAL /* Priority level 1 value */,
  "priority_level_2" REAL /* Priority level 2 value */,
  "priority_level_3" REAL /* Priority level 3 value */,
  "priority_level_4" REAL /* Priority level 4 value */,
  "priority_level_5" REAL /* Priority level 5 value */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., 'Not Started', 'In Progress', 'Completed') */,
  "estimated_start_date" TEXT /* Estimated start date of the task */,
  "estimated_end_date" TEXT /* Estimated end date of the task */,
  "actual_start_date" TEXT /* Actual start date of the task */,
  "actual_end_date" TEXT /* Actual end date of the task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the resource (personnel) assigned to the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the resource is allocated to */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., personnel, equipment, budget) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was allocated */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., 'Personnel', 'Equipment', 'Budget') */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the resource */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Status of the resource allocation (e.g., 'Allocated', 'Deallocated') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
